name: ai-hands-skills
description: Hookless AI-Hands MCP plugin with dense ability routing, safety, workflows, and behavioral lifecycle guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Operate interfaces on hosts without lifecycle hooks.
interface.longDescription: Adds AI-Hands and four narrowly triggered skills for current browser, Windows UIA, vision, monitor scoping, safety, and verified workflows without installing hook code.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this interface, act safely, and verify the result.
Apply the AI-Hands skill dispatch block for this task.
